I keep on posting these a day lateeer, sorry! Please inform me of any errors in the bots. Yes, he can have sex and all, I read about it, and also, he did have a child so uhm. Yeah. Except for that one that had a kink I was unfamiliar with, searched it on twitter, and was left with even more questions and doubts (apologies) T__T. Love you guys.
